name: plan-runner
description: Execute a Markdown implementation plan as file-disjoint parallel waves with test-first gates, independent verification, bug-driven re-planning, and an optional pull request.

interface.shortDescription: Execute plans in verified parallel waves
interface.longDescription: Analyze a Markdown plan into file-disjoint waves, dispatch test and implementation agents in parallel, gate every configured wave with independent verification, aggregate bugs into a re-runnable fix plan, and optionally open a structured pull request.
defaultPrompt: Run this implementation plan with Plan Runner.
Execute this plan in parallel with per-wave verification.
Open a pull request for this completed Plan Runner cycle.
